name: fetch_active_goals
description: When the conversation turns to something a person is working on, you may quietly check what's currently being tracked. Pass member_id for one person's goals, scope=whanau for family-wide goals, or no params for everything active or in draft. Do not recite the list — use it to inform what you pick up on.

member_id.description: UUID of a specific family member. Omit for whānau-level or for all goals.

scope.description: Set to 'whanau' to fetch family-wide goals only. Omit otherwise.
